name: Tower of Babel
oracleText:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — Create a Treasure token.
II — Draw two cards, then discard a card.
III — Each player returns a nonland permanent they control to its owner's hand, then discards a card.
flavorText: "Go to, let us build us a city and a tower, whose top may reach unto heaven." — Genesis 11:4
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme reuses the existing Early World Babel-era tower artwork for the tower itself.
